
### want a more than coverage  {.smaller}


```
int array[16];
for (int i = 0; i < 100; ++i) {
    if (next_input() != 42)
        break;
    array[i] = next_input();
}

```
 

* if just counting coverage…
* hard to end up doing extra iterations of above loop
* supplementing idea: count number of times blocks reached
